schema.parameters: array of tunable hyperparameters controlling the GooseGuesses model
schema.stickiness_overrides: song-specific overrides to the no_repeat_rho default
schema.venue_tiers: venue-class table for V_{s,k} venue boost
schema.shows: target shows with their venue tier and expected length

parameters.subtitle: Recency Weight
parameters.controls: alpha in b_s convex blend (tour vs. last-50)
parameters.description: How much do you trust the freshest gossip? Higher = lean into 2026 tour rotation, lower = wider historical window.

parameters.subtitle: Long-Gap Surprise Energy
parameters.controls: B_s amplitude on the Gaussian bustout bump in g(Delta)
parameters.description: Are you praying for White Lights? Higher = career staples sitting on long gaps get a bigger nudge.

parameters.subtitle: Set-2 Launch-Pad Boost
parameters.controls: pi multiplier for songs in the Top-S2 pool when format guarantees a set 2
parameters.description: Type-II jam vehicle bias. Higher = more confidence the set-2 opener is from the Hungersite/Big Modern!/Animal cluster.

parameters.subtitle: Goodnight-Song Boost
parameters.controls: pi multiplier for songs in the Top-Encore pool when format guarantees an encore
parameters.description: Probability tilt toward Give It Time / Don't Do It / Arcadia in encore slots.

parameters.subtitle: Show-Opener Bias
parameters.controls: pi multiplier for songs in the Top-Opener pool
parameters.description: How strongly does the model favor classic openers (Animal, Yeti, Echo of a Rose) for slot 1.

parameters.subtitle: Set-2 Closer Bias
parameters.controls: pi multiplier for songs in the Top-Close pool
parameters.description: How strongly the model favors Dripfield / Madhuvan / Empress for set-2 closer.

parameters.subtitle: N1->N2 Default Stickiness
parameters.controls: rho_s default for all songs in the catalog (Bayesian N1->N2 update)
parameters.description: How allergic is Goose to Night 1 repeats? -1 = hard exclusion, 0 = independent nights, +0.5 = anchor-song repeat.

parameters.subtitle: Hot Tea / Dripfield N2 Replay
parameters.controls: rho_s for songs listed in stickiness_overrides
parameters.description: Hot Tea / Dripfield / Madhuvan replay vibes. Less negative = more likely to anchor both nights.

parameters.subtitle: Non-Goose Material Likelihood
parameters.controls: scale on the empirical 88% cover rate
parameters.description: Are they pulling Radiohead tonight? 0 = original-only, 1 = recent norm, 2 = covers everywhere.

parameters.subtitle: First-Time-Played Per Slot
parameters.controls: baseline P(debut) per slot (venue tier adjusts this multiplicatively)
parameters.description: Baseline rate of a never-before-played song per slot. Marquee venues multiply this by 3x.

parameters.subtitle: Marquee Multiplier
parameters.controls: V_tier global override (per-tier defaults in venue_tiers table)
parameters.description: MSG = 1.4, Goosemas = 1.3, Amsterdam = 1.0. Higher = more 'special show' energy.

parameters.subtitle: Recency Penalty Exponent
parameters.controls: alpha in g(Delta) = (Delta/Delta_s*)^alpha
parameters.description: How fast do recent plays cool a song off? 1.0 = linear, 0.5 = square-root (gentler).

parameters.subtitle: BIG MODERN! Release-Week Boost
parameters.controls: D_{s,k} scale for confirmed-but-unplayed album tracks during release-week MSG run
parameters.description: How much extra love does an unplayed BIG MODERN! track get at MSG N1 (7 days after release)? Calibrated against the Everything Must Go release (Apr 2025) which averaged 1.6 debuts/show in week 1 vs 0.36 baseline (4.4x lift).

parameters.subtitle: Boost Decay (Shows)
parameters.controls: T_{1/2} in D_{s,k} = 1 + beta * 2^{-(shows_since_debut)/T_{1/2}}
parameters.description: How fast does a debut song stop being a debut? Half-life of 5 means the boost halves every 5 shows.

parameters.subtitle: Sweet-Spot Gap (Shows)
parameters.controls: mu_B (center of Gaussian bustout bump in g)
parameters.description: How many shows of waiting before bustout-time? 70 = ~9 weeks of touring.

parameters.subtitle: Sweet-Spot Width (Shows)
parameters.controls: sigma_B (width of Gaussian bustout bump in g)
parameters.description: How wide is the bustout sweet spot? 25 covers a ~50-show window centered on the peak.

parameters.subtitle: Maximum P(song) Cap
parameters.controls: p_cap in the renormalization step (no song clears this)
parameters.description: No single song clears half a show. Goose's catalog is too deep for any one song to be a 'lock'.

parameters.subtitle: Top-T Songs Per Role
parameters.controls: T_role (how many songs count as 'set-2 launch pads' / 'openers' / 'encore staples')
parameters.description: How many songs count as 'set-2 launch pads'? Audit shows the top 8 captures only 35-44% of role slots; top 12 hits ~58% — wider pool is more honest.

parameters.subtitle: First-Time-Market Bustout Discount
parameters.controls: bustout multiplier override for European first-time venues
parameters.description: European first-time markets get safer setlists. Lower = more accessible material.

parameters.subtitle: Just-Played-Last-Show Cooldown
parameters.controls: multiplicative PENALTY for songs played in the previous show on this leg (e.g., London 5/22)
parameters.description: Goose rotates hard. The empirical 5-day cross-venue overlap rate is 9.6% (n=61). A song played London 5/22 is MUCH less likely 5 days later in Amsterdam. 1.0 = no penalty, 0.45 = ~half as likely.

stickiness_overrides.rationale: Only song with >=2 confirmed N1->N2 repeats since 2024 (Goosemas, Beacon)
1 confirmed N1->N2 repeat (Radio City 4/15/23) + Type-II vehicle

guest_only_covers.context: Viva El Gonzo 5/9/26 with Jim James
guest_only_covers.rationale: One-off special occasion; not in standalone rotation

guest_only_covers.context: Viva El Gonzo 5/7/26 with Cory Wong (FTP)
guest_only_covers.rationale: One-off Hendrix cover at private destination festival; not in standalone rotation

guest_only_covers.context: Harold Melvin cover — MSG 2025 + Hulaween + Athens
guest_only_covers.rationale: Played at marquee venues; would not be a normal Amsterdam pick

guest_only_covers.context: Billy Joel cover with Stuart Bogie
guest_only_covers.rationale: Horn-dependent NYC-flavored cover; played at Viva El Gonzo only

hot_tea_slot_bias.rationale: AUDIT (Q8): Hot Tea distribution across 164 career plays — set1_closer 25.6%, set2_closer 17.7%, encore 15.2%, other_mid 30.5%, show_opener 6.7%, set2_opener only 4.3%. Hot Tea is a CLOSER, not a launch pad.

venue_tiers.audit_note: AUDIT Q7: marquee cover rate 88.9% essentially matches last-50 baseline 88.0%; cover_mult set to 1.0 (was 1.1). Marquee differentiation is via DEBUT covers, not MORE covers.

shows.name: Amsterdam Melkweg N1
shows.notes: European leg debut at venue. London 5/22 is freshest signal.

shows.name: Amsterdam Melkweg N2
shows.notes: Second night; apply no_repeat_rho conditioning on N1 outcome.

shows.name: MSG Night 2
shows.notes: Apply no_repeat_rho on N1; speculative horn-section sit-in boost lives here.

ui_groupings.label: Set Position
ui_groupings.subtitle: Opener / launch pad / closer / encore priors

validation_targets.rationale: Targets benchmark against Reed (2018) Phish LSTM at Brier ~0.040 on equivalent K.
